Service
Description: Service synthesizes vast amounts of data already available from trusted knowledge sources to enhance customer experiences and boost agent productivity. Without costly rip and replace efforts, Service provides flexibility to quickly begin realizing the benefits of bringing data from existing investments in CRM and contact center solutions such as Salesforce. Service brings AI capabilities such as case summary, drafting an email, and chat with copilot when embedded in CRM. Additionally, Service works in Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft Teams providing capabilities such as email summary, case summary and edit/update to CRM records and since Service is included ins Microsoft 365 Copilot license, service representatives are equipped more broadly with productivity enhancements in their flow of work across the tools agents already use every day, such as Outlook and Teams.  A Microsoft 365 Global Administrator is required to install and set up Service. Service also requires a paid license to access the app capabilities. For more details, please visit the Service website or contact your Microsoft representative.  Service allows administrators and users to access content and share data outside of Microsoft 365, including with third-party CRM services. Such data sharing is subject to Microsoft and applicable third-party CRM terms and conditions. Data sharing is not enabled until administrators and users in your organization consent to connect their Microsoft work or school account with their CRM account.  Service for Microsoft Teams will have permission to participate in Teams meetings and collect Teams meetings data such as meeting recordings and transcripts. [Click here](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2259507) for more information to get started with Service.

Name: Sales
Description: Sales in Microsoft 365 Copilot brings AI directly into the applications that sellers use daily – Copilot, Outlook, and Teams – to help them move with speed and agility while staying focused on customer engagement.  **What you can do with Sales:**  - Get customer and deal info from Dynamics 365 or Salesforce CRM using natural language - Prepare for customer meetings in minutes - Draft sales emails and create personalized content for customers - Get AI-generated insights and next-step recommendations - Managers can track performance and coach with AI-powered tools - Customize Sales according to your business needs  A Microsoft 365 Global Administrator is required to install and set up Sales. It may be subject to an additional free or paid license. For more details, please read documentation about [getting started with Sales](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?linkid=2334953) or contact your Microsoft representative.  Sales allows administrators and users to access content and share data outside of Microsoft 365, including with third-party customer relationship management (CRM) services. Such data sharing is subject to Microsoft and applicable third-party CRM terms and conditions. Data sharing is not enabled until administrators and users in your organization consent to connect their Microsoft work or school account with their CRM account.  Sales in Microsoft 365 Copilot will have permission to participate in Microsoft Teams meetings and collect Teams meetings data such as meeting recordings and transcripts.  **Note:** When Sales is deployed by an administrator, it will have permission to automatically review email and appointment recipient lists when sending emails or creating and modifying appointments. This allows support for key actions such as displaying a banner to add new contacts to the CRM system and updating the Sales side panel with relevant CRM information for those contacts.  **Discover more with these helpful links:** - [Explore what's possible with Sales](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?linkid=2259005) - Check out our [FAQ](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?linkid=2258498)

Name: Adobe Acrobat for Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Copilot
Description:
Work with PDFs directly within Microsoft Copilot across Microsoft 365 Copilot app, Teams, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. When you open or reference a PDF in Copilot, Acrobat’s trusted PDF technology powers document actions within the conversational flow — without switching apps. High quality viewing — Read high-fidelity PDFs directly within Copilot. Edit and organize — Edit, export, extract, redact, compress, convert, or reorganize pages using Acrobat tools. Seamless handoff — Continue deeper editing in Acrobat on the web with context preserved. Tenant admins can set Adobe Acrobat app as the default PDF viewer in Teams by setting a policy on Teams Admin Center to install the app on user's client. Instructions on how to do this are available here. Admins can also configure the end user experience from the Admin configuration portal.

Free-to-use features:

  • High-quality viewing – the only PDF viewing experience that lets you open high-fidelity PDFs directly within Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 (Office), for a satisfying and seamless work experience.
  • Central access to PDFs – Files shared in Teams Channels and Chats, or files stored in OneDrive or your computer, available centrally in Teams to work on.
  • Streamline PDF review —Collect channel members' feedback in a single PDF directly in Teams instead of gathering and reconciling feedback via multiple attachments.*
  • Keep reviewers informed — Reviewers get notified when others reply to their comments.
  • Collaborate with confidence – Collaborate securely with trusted members and retain the ability to store document versions in Microsoft SharePoint or OneDrive.**
Premium features (require Acrobat subscription):
  • If you do not have an existing Acrobat subscription, subscribe now to unlock these features right within Acrobat in Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 (Office).
  • Convert PDFs to Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, or Image
  • Combine multiple documents and file types into one PDF file
  • Delete, rotate, extract, insert or reorder pages of a PDF
  • Reduce the size of your PDF for easier sharing
  • Add a password to protect your PDF

Acrobat AI Assistant features (requires AI Assistant add-on):

Al Assistant for Adobe Acrobat is a conversational feature that lets you interact with your documents to get quick answers to questions based on your PDF content in a comprehensive and informative way.

  • Insights you can trust — AI Assistant looks only at the documents you tell it to. And by generating verifiable insights with attributions back to the source, you can be assured you are accessing credible information.
  • Writing made easy — Empower your team to rapidly create high-quality professional content for emails, blogs, presentations, research summaries, and more. Use the responses AI Assistant generated from your documents to get the write-up you need and produce your deliverables in less time.
  • Enhanced meeting transcript support — Whether you are leading a meeting, participating, or missed it altogether, enhanced meeting transcript support will help you stay in the know and turn meeting insights into takeaway actions. Automatically generate meeting summaries from transcripts to understand main topics, key points, and action items.

* Commenting currently is not supported on the mobile experience.

** Learn more about security for Acrobat here.

The app utilizes the 'onMessageAttachmentsChanged' launch event to improve email collaboration. Specifically, it detects when a PDF is attached to an email and prompts users to convert the PDF into a shareable Adobe Document Cloud public link.

Name: Excel (Agent)
Description: The Excel agent for Microsoft Copilot provides a natural-language way of creating workbooks outside of Excel. Describe what you need—like a budget tracker, project plan, or financial model—and the agent builds the structure for you. It sets up sheets, organizes data, and creates working formulas so you can start working immediately.

Name: Sales Development (Frontier)
Description:
Sales Development Agent (SDA) is your always-on sales assistant, designed to help your team engage more prospects and qualify more leads. It learns from your best practices such as sample emails, product details, qualification criteria, and messaging guidelines, then uses that knowledge to engage prospects, respond to questions, assess fit, and handoff leads to sellers. You stay in full control: test and refine the approach through simulations before going live, then let SDA handle the conversation flow while your team focuses on high-value interactions. Everything stays visible through Microsoft Teams so you can monitor conversations, track qualified leads, and step in whenever you want.

SDA expands sales development capacity without added operational overhead while keeping governance, control, and data security with your organization. Learn more.

By installing Sales Development Agent, you acknowledge and agree that, where in-region processing capacity or required service components are unavailable, certain data associated with the service may be processed outside your selected geographic region. This consent does not modify, waive, or otherwise affect any existing commitments applicable to customers within the EU Data Boundary.

If you do not consent to the potential processing of data outside your selected geographic region, you must not install Sales Development Agent. If you wish to revoke such consent, you must uninstall Sales Development Agent.

If you come across any objectionable AI-generated content, please reach out to us at salesagentteam@microsoft.com.


Frontier

The new Frontier program gives customers early, hands-on access to experimental Microsoft 365 Copilot innovations right in their own environment. The agents and AI features designated as 'Frontier' are previews, built for evaluation and feedback purposes. As these features are still in development, their availability and capabilities may change at any time. Learn more about how you can help shape the next generation of Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Name: Word (Agent)
Description: The Word agent for Microsoft Copilot provides a natural-language way of creating documents outside of Word. Just describe what you need—like a proposal, report, or newsletter—and the agent creates a well-structured draft with headings, sections, and professional formatting for you to review, finalize, and share.

Name: PowerPoint (Agent)
Description: The PowerPoint agent for Microsoft Copilot provides a natural-language way of creating presentations outside of PowerPoint. Share your topic or goals, and the agent incorporates your work data to build complete decks with layouts, design themes, and slides—ready for you to refine and deliver.

Name: Tavily
Description:
Tavily brings real-time web knowledge into Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat. Use natural language to search the web, extract content from any URL or crawl pages at depth — without leaving Copilot.

What's included

  • Web search — configurable depth, domain filters, and time-range filters for precise, current results with citations.
  • Page extraction — returns full content from one or many URLs as clean markdown or plain text, preserving headings, lists, and code blocks.
  • Guided crawling — visits pages at depth and uses natural-language instructions to focus the crawl on relevant content.

Who it's for

Developers, analysts, and researchers who need fresh, verifiable web information to complement their own enterprise data — or who need to pull structured content from specific pages or sites on demand.

Why Tavily

Tavily returns information-dense, agent-ready results — configurable search depth, per-domain filtering, time-range filtering, full-page markdown extraction, and natural-language-guided crawling, all purpose-built for AI agents.

Getting started

On first tool use, Copilot prompts you to sign in to Tavily via OAuth. Includes 1,000 free monthly credits. Manage or purchase additional credits at tavily.com. Documentation: docs.tavily.com. Support: support@tavily.com.

Name: Mural
Description:
Seeing is How™ teams get to outcomes faster Mural puts visual thinking and AI-powered facilitation directly where work happens. Whether the task is running a brainstorm, aligning a distributed team, or synthesizing a complex strategy, Mural transforms collaboration into structured, outcome-driven sessions within Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Mural's intuitive workspace and AI-powered tools bring teams into alignment instantly – helping you move from concept to outcome with speed and clarity. Automatically cluster sticky notes by topic, discover new directions on-the-fly with generative mind maps, create concise summaries to synthesize ideas, and much more. Mural is enterprise-grade, with rigorous security, reliability, compliance, and privacy measures, combined with advanced security and administrative controls – meeting the most stringent IT and regulatory requirements. With Mural and Microsoft, teams spend less time organizing information and more time acting on it. The shared visual canvas gives everyone a space to contribute, prioritize, and align so that decisions happen faster and work moves forward. Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • Use Mural in Microsoft 365 Copilot to search your murals and templates. Sample prompt: Find the retrospective mural I created last week.
    • Microsoft Teams meeting integration
  • Collaborate on a mural in real-time during a Teams video meeting to increase inclusivity, engagement, and creativity with your team.
    • Microsoft Teams custom tab integration
  • Embed a mural as a tab to any chat or channel in Teams where you can collaborate visually, and simply reference or return to the mural to keep collaboration going.
    • Microsoft Teams meeting invitation integration
  • Pin a mural to any Teams calendar meeting invite to share information ahead of time or easily find the right mural for a recurring meeting.
    • Microsoft Teams notifications bot
  • The Mural bot will send you relevant notifications in Teams: if someone mentions you or invites you to a mural, the Mural bot will let you know by sending you a private chat message.
    • Microsoft Teams personal app integration
  • In the personal app, access and work on any mural just as you would in the Mural web app, right within Teams.
    • Microsoft Teams messaging extension
  • Add Mural templates to all of your projects, meetings and workshops. Search, share, and create murals from templates directly in Teams.
    • Personal app integration in Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365
  • In the personal app, access and work on any mural just as you would in the Mural web app, right within Outlook and Microsoft 365.
    • Messaging extension in Microsoft Outlook
  • Add Mural templates to email communications. Search for, and share templates directly in Outlook by using the Mural messaging extension.
    • NOTE: In order to use this app, you need to be a member of Mural. Get started for free (https://mural.co/)

Name: Polivada
Description:
Your UK public affairs team is spending up to 20 hours a week on manual research - trawling Parliament's website, Googling MPs, copy-pasting from Hansard, compiling briefings in Word. That's not strategy. That's data entry.

Polivada is an AI-powered UK parliamentary intelligence platform that turns hours of manual research into minutes - available directly within Microsoft Copilot and Microsoft Teams.

What Polivada does

Polivada connects to official UK Parliament APIs and makes parliamentary data searchable, analysable, and actionable through natural language. Ask Polivada to find every MP who has spoken about a topic, draft a briefing for an upcoming meeting, or surface all written questions on your sector — and get cited, source-linked results in seconds.

Key benefits
  • Hours saved every week - what used to take a morning now takes minutes. Search across debates, written questions, committee proceedings, Early Day Motions, and MP profiles without leaving Copilot.
  • Briefings in seconds - generate full MP and Lord briefing packs including biography, career history, parliamentary roles, and registered financial interests on demand.
  • Never miss what matters - use AI-powered semantic search to find relevant parliamentary activity by concept, not just keyword.
Capabilities within Microsoft Copilot and Teams
  • Natural language search across all UK parliamentary content types
  • MP and Lord profile lookup and briefing generation
  • Debate and speech search with sector and policy theme filters
  • Written questions and answers retrieval by department or keyword
  • Committee session and oral evidence tracking
  • Early Day Motion search by sponsor, signatory, or keyword
  • Curated research collections - analyse your curated data to create powerful reports
  • Multiple API tools covering key public affairs use cases
Who it's for

Polivada is designed for government affairs and public affairs professionals at UK corporates, trade bodies, and consultancies who need to stay ahead of parliamentary activity relevant to their organisation and brief stakeholders at short notice.

Getting started

To use Polivada within Microsoft Copilot, users must first register for an active Polivada account and subscription at app.polivada.ai. Sign in using your existing Microsoft credentials — no separate password required. Once your account has been approved, the Polivada agent for Microsoft Copilot is available immediately within Microsoft Copilot.

For more information, to request a demo, or to get started, visit polivada.ai or contact us at support@polivada.ai.

Account requirement: An active Polivada account and subscription is required to use this app. Please contact us at support@polivada.ai for more details.

Name: Message Center Adoption Agent
Description:
Transform Message Center Updates into Professional Adoption Materials

The Message Center Adoption Agent is an agent for Microsoft Copilot that helps IT teams, change managers, and Microsoft 365 administrators quickly understand service updates and generate comprehensive, professional adoption materials—saving hours of work on every update.

What It Does

This agent works with Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 Copilot to automatically fetch Message Center service announcements and transform technical updates into clear, actionable materials that your organization can immediately use for change management and user communications.

Key capabilities:

  • Automatic data retrieval – No more copy-pasting from Message Center. The agent fetches updates directly via Microsoft Graph API.
  • 7-section adoption package – Every update is transformed into a complete set of materials including plain-English summaries, impact assessments, IT action checklists, end-user communications, Teams posts, FAQs, and training snippets.
  • Professional, calm tone – Designed specifically for regulated, risk-aware organizations that need clarity over hype.
  • Immediate productivity – From "new update published" to "materials ready to distribute" in minutes instead of hours.

Who Should Use This

This solution is ideal for:

  • IT Administrators managing Microsoft 365 service changes
  • Change Managers responsible for communicating updates to end users
  • Service Desk Teams preparing for user questions about new features
  • Training Teams creating quick-reference materials for new capabilities
  • Compliance & Risk Teams in regulated industries (finance, healthcare, government) who need thorough documentation

What You Get

For every Message Center update, the agent generates:

  1. Plain-English Summary – 3-5 bullet points for senior leadership explaining what's changing, why it matters, and when it happens
  2. Impact Assessment – Clear identification of who is affected (IT, end users, security, compliance) and the level of impact
  3. IT & Admin Action Checklist – Required and optional tasks with timelines, ready to assign
  4. End-User Email – Ready-to-send communication in calm, reassuring language with no jargon
  5. Teams Announcement Post – 3-5 short bullets optimized for Microsoft Teams channels
  6. FAQ Section – 5-8 realistic questions users and leaders will ask, with clear answers
  7. 5-Minute Training Snippet – Micro-learning content with do/don't guidance and scenario examples

How It Works

The Message Center Adoption Agent connects to your own backend API deployed in your Azure subscription. This architecture ensures:

  • ✅ Data stays in your environment – Your Message Center data never leaves your Microsoft 365 tenant
  • ✅ Full control – You manage all credentials and access via your Azure AD
  • ✅ Security & compliance – Read-only access using official Microsoft Graph API with full audit logging
  • ✅ Cost-effective – Pay only for your Azure consumption (typically $0.50-$8/month)

Requirements & Limitations

For End Users:

  • Microsoft 365 Copilot license
  • Access granted by Microsoft Teams administrator

For IT Deployment (Required):

  • Azure subscription (any tier) – Required to deploy the backend API
  • Azure AD app registration with ServiceMessage.Read.All permission – Admin consent required
  • 30-45 minutes for initial setup
  • Basic familiarity with Azure Functions deployment

Important: In order to use this app, an active Azure subscription and Azure AD app registration with admin-consented ServiceMessage.Read.All permission are required. The agent cannot function without the backend API deployed to your Azure environment.

Deployment Guide: Complete step-by-step deployment instructions, backend source code (TypeScript/Azure Functions), and troubleshooting guide are available at: https://www.wearecloudandclear.co.uk/message-center-assistant/docs

Get Started: Installation guide and support available at: https://www.wearecloudandclear.co.uk/message-center-assistant/get-started

Need Help? Contact our support team: https://www.wearecloudandclear.co.uk/#contact

What Makes This Different

Unlike generic AI assistants, the Message Center Adoption Agent is purpose-built for Microsoft 365 change management:

  • Structured output – Always follows the proven 7-section format, ensuring consistency
  • Tone calibration – No marketing speak or exaggeration—just clear, factual communication
  • Time savings – Reduce adoption material creation from hours to minutes
  • Quality consistency – Every update gets the same thorough treatment
  • Self-hosted security – Your data, your infrastructure, your control

Pricing & Costs

This app is free to install. You pay only for your Azure resources:

  • Typical monthly cost: $0.50 - $8 USD (Azure Functions Consumption Plan)
  • First month: Often free due to Azure free tier
  • Scales automatically with usage
  • No per-user fees or licensing costs

Support & Documentation

Comprehensive documentation is included:

  • Complete deployment guide with step-by-step instructions
  • Backend source code (TypeScript/Azure Functions)
  • Troubleshooting guide for common issues
  • OpenAPI specification for the backend API
  • Security best practices and compliance guidance

Documentation Hub: https://www.wearecloudandclear.co.uk/message-center-assistant/docs

Privacy & Security

Built for Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 Copilot, this agent for Microsoft Copilot operates entirely within your environment using official Microsoft Graph APIs. All data remains in your tenant with full audit logging.

This application is developed for Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 Copilot by Cloud and Clear. It is not an official Microsoft product.
